subcodes.first_line: A remembrance for him who hath turned toward My Countenance and hearkened unto My Call when it was raised betwixt heaven and earth, that he might perceive My fragrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکری لمن اقبل الی وجهی و سمع ندائی اذ ارتفع بین السموات و الارضین لیجد عرف
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @chastisement and requital, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @praise and encouragement, @transcendence; unknowability of God
